# MySQL Module (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/mysql`.

## Docs

- [Module Overview](./index.md): Overview of MySQL modeling, performance, and operations practices.
- [Schema Design](./schema-design.md): Table and schema design principles for consistent data models.
- [Transactions and Locks](./transactions-locks.md): Isolation levels, lock behavior, and deadlock diagnosis.
- [Performance Tuning](./performance-tuning.md): Query and index optimization priorities for MySQL.
- [Operations Checklist](./operations-checklist.md): Operational checks before release and during incidents.
- [Sidebar Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for MySQL module pages.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this MySQL directory.
